_meta.description: Ground-truth KS baselines for the T4-2 end-to-end harness. Each dataset's baseline_ks is a one-off, human-tuned KS captured as ground truth; the agent's run_ks output PASSES when agent_ks >= baseline_ks - tolerance. See docs/ks_baseline/README.md.

synthetic_smoke.note: CI smoke ANCHOR only — a conservative floor on the built-in deterministic synthetic dataset (marvis.sample_data.generate_sample_frame, n_rows=2000, seed=20260701). NOT a KS-standard: it proves the harness runs end-to-end, not that the agent meets a public benchmark. Observed test_ks is ~0.66; the floor is set low so the anchor is stable across minor LR changes.

provenance.tuned_by: harness author (conservative floor, not a tuning run)

give_me_some_credit.note: PLACEHOLDER — fill in after the one-off human-tuned baseline experiment. Drop the Kaggle 'Give Me Some Credit' cs-training.csv into datasets/give_me_some_credit/ and run scripts/ks_baseline.py --record to capture the tuned KS as ground truth here. Target column: SeriousDlqin2yrs.

home_credit.note: PLACEHOLDER — fill in after the one-off human-tuned baseline experiment. Drop the Kaggle 'Home Credit Default Risk' application_train.csv into datasets/home_credit/ and run scripts/ks_baseline.py --record to capture the tuned KS as ground truth here. Target column: TARGET.
